items.title: A trillion dollars is a stupid amount of money
items.description: Elon Musk is now officially the world's first trillionaire. That is a colossal amount of wealth (and by proxy, power) for one individual to have. Its scale - a thousand times more than a billion - is difficult to fathom for those of us who aren't among the 3,363 billionaires that currently exist in ...

items.title: Siri is good now??
items.description: You'd be forgiven for thinking this day would never come. items.description: Elon Musk's net worth has passed the trillion-dollar mark after SpaceX's IPO.
